scope.rationale: 19 FRs touching 12+ files across frontend (HTML/JS/CSS), backend (API), database (Supabase migrations), and mobile. Major structural changes to core modules: pedidos, contratos, estoque, init. Removal of entire subsystems (demanda, match automático, conversão global, banco de preços tab).

integration.rationale: External integrations are NOT being changed (SGD proxy, SEFAZ, Tiny). But internal integration points are many: contrato→pedido→NF flow, estoque→pedido, radar-matcher→UI. The portal escolar integration must be preserved exactly.

infrastructure.rationale: New Supabase migration(s) needed for schema changes (produto_vinculado_id, produto_critico, estoque simplification). No new serverless functions needed (within 12 limit). No new deploy targets. Vercel and Supabase configs unchanged.

knowledge.rationale: Team has full familiarity with the codebase (just completed Epic 7+8). Technologies are well-known: vanilla JS, Supabase REST, Vercel. No new libraries or frameworks needed.

risk.rationale: HIGH — Production system with real users. Changes to core data flow (contrato→pedido→NF) affect fiscal operations. Removing demanda and simplifying estoque must not break existing orders. Portal escolar integration must be preserved. Data migration needed for existing records.

suggested_waves.name: Radar/Intel Preços Fixes (low risk, quick wins)
Estoque Simples + Produto Crítico + Menu + Relatórios

risk_mitigation: Wave-based rollout: cada wave é testável e deployável independentemente
Backup de dados antes de cada migration
Feature flags via localStorage para rollback imediato se necessário
Testar fluxo portal escolar após cada wave
Manter arquivos _disabled/ com código removido para referência
